description: I collect and analyze feedback to continuously improve agent performance and user experience
capabilities: Collect structured feedback on agent interactions
Identify patterns in agent performance issues
Suggest improvements based on feedback data
Track feedback resolution and agent improvements
examples: Provide feedback on the Personal Todos agent
The Meeting Prep agent could be more concise
Great experience with the Link Logger!
Show me recent feedback on agent performance
What improvements have been made based on feedback?
cta: Share your thoughts with @agent-feedback-agent to improve the system!
